# Unshakeable Foundation
## Scripture
"The Lord will fulfill his purpose for me; your steadfast love, O God, endures forever." – Psalm 138:8
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we often face challenges that test our faith and resolve. We may feel like our foundation is being shaken, and our doubts may try to creep in. But the Bible reminds us that God's love and purpose for us endure forever. He is our rock, our shelter, and our stronghold. When we face uncertainty, we must anchor ourselves in His Word and His promises. We must trust that His plan is greater than ours, and that He will see us through every trial. By fixing our eyes on Him, we can build an unshakeable foundation that will stand firm against any storm.

## Daily Challenge
Do 10 deep-breathing exercises while repeating Psalm 138:8 to yourself, and then go out and face your day with confidence.
